technical_debt.substitution: CLI integration alert line not rendered at runtime — `aitri-hub monitor` command is currently a stub with no active render loop (monitor was removed in a prior commit). The IntegrationAlertBanner renders correctly in the web dashboard and integrationAlert is written to dashboard.json. CLI alert rendering requires re-implementing the monitor render loop, which is tracked in the backlog.

TC-013f and TC-013f2 (ENOENT and timeout paths) verified via regex and interface tests instead of full execFileSync mock — Node.js built-in `node:test` runner requires `mock.module()` (v22+) for ESM module mocking; the project targets Node 18+. Failure-path behavior (null return + WARN log) is covered by the integration guard tests (TC-010f) which exercise the full null-input path. Full subprocess mock can be added when Node 22 becomes the minimum.
